features.title: Harness + CE + Graphify workflow bootstrap
acceptance: AGENTS.md 明确采用 harness + ce + graphify 默认工作流
docs/harness/dualpad-builder.md 与 .dualpad-builder/ 记忆层已落地
repo-local graphify 自动化已配置并完成初始化

features.title: Runtime input pipeline truth
acceptance: 当前正式输入主链在 README、ARCHITECTURE 和 baseline 文档里保持一致
Action lifecycle、poll commit、XInput bridge 的 owner 边界有统一口径
builder memory 能诚实指向该主线的当前 slice 和验证入口

features.title: Route-health contract freeze
acceptance: 顶层 route_state 继续固定为 active_fresh / active_stale / disabled
drain_reason、last_poll_age_ms、hook_installed 被收口为 secondary diagnostics，而不是新的主状态体系
本 slice 只冻结当前兼容态合同与验证面，不删除 rollback gate / stale assist drain，也不引入新的 owner 抽象

features.title: Menu context policy and gameplay/menu ownership
acceptance: MenuContextPolicy、InputContextNames 与 menu runtime truth 有统一入口
Gameplay/Menu ownership 的当前实现和已知 handoff 异常被分开记录
相关验证矩阵和 builder memory 状态保持一致

features.title: Native routing, controlmap combo overlay, and mod-event helper
acceptance: Native routing、controlmap overlay 和 ModEvent helper backend 的正式支持面有统一口径
runtime gate、overlay 路径和 helper backend 约束在文档与代码 reality 之间不冲突
相关 slice 的验证结果能写回 builder memory

features.title: Dynamic glyph and menu presentation surfaces
acceptance: 主菜单和共享 glyph bridge 的当前 truth 被明确收口
repo 当前不拥有的 FavoritesMenu workspace 不再被误写成已存在实现
页面级 glyph 工作的验证入口、边界和当前焦点能被 builder memory 追踪

features.title: Glyph compat diagnostics freeze
acceptance: status / fallback / ambiguity 只先进入内部诊断面、日志、trace 与 targeted tests
旧 DualPad_GetActionGlyphToken 继续返回单个 token string；旧 DualPad_GetActionGlyph descriptor 继续保持 ok / buttonArtToken / semanticId / contextName
任何旧返回对象字段扩展都延后到 Phase 6 的 prompt contract 明确之后再决定

features.title: Phase 0 replay barrier
acceptance: schema / harness bootstrap、diff runner 与 repo-owned mandatory scenario bundle 已落地
dispatcher / processor runtime replay seam 已分别驱动 PadEventSnapshotDispatcher / PadEventSnapshotProcessor，并通过 Phase 0 batch diff
CSV simulator / materialize-fixture 不得作为 PH0 runtime proof
phase0_scenarios.json 以 mandatory=false / conditional_live 标记 FavoritesMenu 条件场景，workspace 未恢复时不会成为退出条件
Phase 0 target、trace schema、runtime replay tests、batch diff runner 和 progress close-out 可追踪

features.title: Phase 1 catalog and manifest compiler
acceptance: ContextCatalog、ActionManifest、LegacyIniImporter 和 ManifestValidator 有固定代码落点
AtomicConfigReloader::Promote() 与 ActionManifestPublisher::PublishPromotedBundle(...) 的 manifest marker handoff 不再留到实现阶段决定
manifest compiler prove-out target 可执行并写回 builder memory

features.title: Phase 2 menu instance truth
acceptance: UiMenuObserver、MenuInstanceRegistry、ContextResolver 和 ActionSetResolver 的 owner 边界落地
contextRevision、menuStackRevision 和 presentationPolicyId 有 shadow compare gate
legacy context adapter 不再承担 menu instance truth

features.title: Phase 3 presentation split
acceptance: SourceEvidenceCollector、PresentationProjection 和 SkyrimCompatibilitySurface 分层落地
DeviceFamilyChanged marker 与 SourceEvidence 配对合同进入已发布 seam，且 revision 一致性有 exit gate
presentation rollback 和 shadow parity 有固定验证入口

features.title: Phase 4 action graph and interaction engine
acceptance: ControlPath、BindingModifier、InteractionSpec、DisplayBinding 与 CompiledActionGraph 合同落地
CompiledActionGraphPublisher::Publish(...) 作为 compiled graph publication owner 与 runtime swap 入口已冻结
Action Graph prove-out 覆盖 layer/combo/fail-closed 场景

features.title: Phase 5 gameplay projection
acceptance: GameplayProjectionFrame、RecoveryPlan 和 GameplayPresentationPublisher 落地
HardReset / SoftResync / clean baseline 的 native、helper、presentation 同步顺序有 targeted tests
legacy coordinator feedback loop 不再是 gameplay projection authority

features.title: Phase 6 prompt projection
acceptance: PromptProjection / PromptService 取代 glyph reverse lookup authority
旧 SWF API 兼容策略与 repo-owned startmenu.swf smoke gate 已冻结
DP4a compat tests 不会在 Phase 6 后继续钉死旧 fallback 语义

features.title: Phase 7 ingress and resync
acceptance: manifestEpoch 与 deviceFamilyRevision 的 authoritative 来源固定为 ingress marker payload
boundary key、transition frame、HardReset / SoftResync 规则无第二 authority
Ingress recovery prove-out 覆盖 marker mismatch、queue overflow 和 manifest reload

features.title: Phase 8 cutover entry gate
acceptance: Phase 8 只作为 closeout 入口，不重新设计 runtime 合同
09a runtime closeout 与 09b governance closeout 的职责边界清晰
canonical prove-out targets 的归属不再在 09b 首次补建

features.title: Phase 8A runtime closeout
acceptance: runtime public surface swap、legacy deletion 和 shim shrink 完成
6 类 canonical runtime prove-out targets 已存在并通过
replay root 仍固定为 tests/replay/golden/

features.title: Phase 8B governance closeout
acceptance: docgen provenance、reviewed docs 去重和默认 CI 接线完成
generated facts 与 reviewed narrative 不再争夺 authority
builder memory、baseline、CI 和 graphify close-out 口径一致

features.title: Validation, cleanup, and workflow honesty
acceptance: 验证入口、cleanup 风险和 handoff 规则形成可复述的 close-out 链
builder memory、shared docs 和 graphify close-out 规则不再脱节
passes 只在真实验证完成后更新
